/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -W -Wfloat-equal -Wundef -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wredundant-decls -Wchar-subscripts -Wcomment -Wformat=2 -Wwrite-strings -Wmissing-declarations -Wredundant-decls -Wswitch-enum -Winit-self -Wmissing-field-initializers -Waddress -Wmissing-noreturn -Wstrict-overflow=1 -Wextra -Warray-bounds -Wshadow -pedantic -Werror=switch-enum -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -O3 -DNDEBUG -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 1.99.0 -o libsurfer.1.99.dylib -install_name @rpath/libsurfer.1.99.dylib CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/cgaltools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/BGLGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/SkeletonDCEL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/SkeletonStructure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/BasicInput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/BasicTriangulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/EventQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/KineticTriangulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/KineticTriangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/WavefrontEdge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/WavefrontVertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/CollapseSpec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/surf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/src/surf_c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/surflib.dir/easyloggingpp/src/easylogging++.cc.o  /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_graph.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_iostreams.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_random.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_regex.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libmpfr.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib
